title: [Problem] Getting multiple calls to a custom monday app from a single trigger fire

posts.author: VasuMakesApps (Vasu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. I am developing a custom integration with Node.js.
Whenever a trigger is fired there are multiple calls being sent to my integration server.

I am using Ngrok for serving for testing purposes (but this problem is valid for monday tunnel as well)

Please find the attached video.

https://global.discourse-cdn.com/monday/original/3X/8/9/89d834408694c0c26f8dbf43e86754ae9d1eaf23.mov
